content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names what they're seeing rather than only engaging the content. Turn 4 explicitly names the move away from the body ('I notice you just moved away from your body pretty fast'). Turn 6 names the omission — the client listed everything except what it's like to present. Turn 8 catches the linguistic caveat ('\"A little nerve-wracking\" and \"fine\" are doing a lot of work there') — a textbook AoA read of language doing defensive work. Turn 10 pauses on the client's own phrase ('I don't have time to be scared') instead of moving past it. Turn 12 holds the 'fall apart' read rather than letting it slip by. Turn 14 reads the pattern — that 'getting through Thursday' is a recurring structure, not a one-off — and the client lands on it ('...oh'). Reads precede questions throughout, are specific (linguistic, somatic, structural), and are timely. The one thing missing is an explicit naming of the rush/buzzing signature itself, but the function is operative across multiple turns.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Body question without first naming a read — blind question, though directionally right."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the move-away-from-body in real time; read precedes the follow-up question."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the omission in the list — what the client did NOT say. Distinguishes said from shown."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Specific linguistic-caveat read: 'fine' and 'a little nerve-wracking' are doing a lot of work. Names the defense before inquiring."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pauses on the client's exact phrase rather than moving past it — names the read implicitly by quoting and staying."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds the 'fall apart' moment; refuses to let the client skate past their own disclosure."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pattern-level read: detects the recurring 'get through X' structure and surfaces it via question that exposes it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-rush-signature", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Rush signature is operative (coach refuses to match pace, names the buzzing-past-the-body) even though never labeled by name."
}
